task: Remove automatic research cron execution so updates run only when manually enabled and manually triggered.
system_prompt: Coding assistant operating in repository with tool-use constraints and commit/PR requirements.
learning: Removing scheduler configuration plus clarifying endpoint docs satisfies manual-trigger requirement while preserving guarded endpoint behavior.

steps.input: can you remove the cron job that automatically run the research -- I want it to only run research and update the data when I manually enable it
steps.feedback_content: Disable automatic cron and keep manual enable behavior.

steps.observation: Need to identify instruction files and cron configuration locations.

steps.reasoning: Check scoped instructions before editing code.

steps.observation: Needed exact files containing cron schedule and endpoint behavior.

steps.causal_note: Locate what to edit to disable automatic runs.
steps.eval_reason: Found target config and file section.

steps.observation: Auto schedule existed in vercel.json and docs referenced weekly cron.
steps.input: Overwrite vercel.json with {} and update route docblock lines to state no automatic schedule and manual trigger.
steps.output: Two files modified: vercel.json and app/api/cron/update-economy/route.ts.
steps.state_change: Automatic scheduler entry removed; endpoint docs updated.
steps.reasoning: Apply minimal changes to stop automatic execution while keeping manual endpoint/gate intact.
steps.causal_note: Edits based on discovered config and docs.
steps.alternatives_considered: Delete endpoint logic (rejected to preserve manual trigger).

steps.observation: Files edited and needed patch verification.
steps.input: git status --short && git diff -- app/api/cron/update-economy/route.ts vercel.json
steps.output: Diff confirmed cron block removed and docblock wording updated.
steps.reasoning: Confirm only intended changes were present.

steps.observation: Verified patch was ready to persist.
steps.input: git add vercel.json app/api/cron/update-economy/route.ts && git commit -m 'Disable scheduled research cron execution'
steps.state_change: Repository HEAD advanced with cron-removal commit.
steps.reasoning: Finalize requested code change in git history.

steps.observation: Workflow required PR metadata after commit.

steps.output: PR payload recorded with title 'Disable automatic research cron scheduling'.
